items.label: Request Adversarial LLM Review
items.description: Request LLM review of your post. Includes linked content.

items.label: Chain Mop
items.description: Remove and/or lock this comment chain

items.label: Saved Responses
items.description: Comment with with a canned response.

items.label: Saved Responses
items.description: Add, edit, or delete saved general responses

items.label: Flood Quota
items.description: Check a user's flood quota status.

items.label: LLM Reviewer Settings
items.description: Manage LLM reviewer settings and clear review locks.

items.label: Create Bingo Post
items.description: Manually create this week's bingo post.

items.label: Bingo Settings
items.description: Configure and manage the bingo game.

geminiApiKey.label: Gemini API key
geminiApiKey.helpText: Google Gemini API key used by the !define command for term resolution.

supabaseUrl.label: Supabase project URL
supabaseUrl.helpText: https://YOUR_PROJECT.supabase.co — used for the async PDF review queue.

supabaseServiceRoleKey.label: Supabase service role key
supabaseServiceRoleKey.helpText: Service role key for the review_jobs table. Keep secret.

botSignature.label: General — Bot signature
botSignature.helpText: Appended to all bot comments. Leave blank for no signature.
botSignature.defaultValue: I am a bot. This action was performed automatically. Contact the moderators if you have questions.

depthCap.label: Depth Cap — Maximum comment depth
depthCap.helpText: Lock comment chains that reach this depth. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 10.

depthCapResponse.label: Depth Cap Moderation — Depth cap triggered comment
depthCapResponse.helpText: Commented when a comment reaches theh maximum depth cap.

floodAssistantResponse.label: Flood Assistant — Flood assistant triggered comment
floodAssistantResponse.helpText: Commented when the flood assistant is triggered.

floodAssistantMaxPosts.label: Flood Assistant — Max posts
floodAssistantMaxPosts.helpText: Maximum number of posts allowed within the time window. Default: 1.

floodAssistantIgnoreModerators.label: Flood Assistant — Ignore moderators
floodAssistantIgnoreModerators.helpText: If enabled, posts by moderators will not be removed.

floodAssistantIgnoreContributors.label: Flood Assistant — Ignore contributors
floodAssistantIgnoreContributors.helpText: If enabled, posts by approved submitters will not be removed.

floodAssistantIgnoreAutoRemoved.label: Flood Assistant — Ignore auto-removed posts
floodAssistantIgnoreAutoRemoved.helpText: If enabled, posts that are immediately removed will not count towards the quota.

floodAssistantIgnoreRemoved.label: Flood Assistant — Ignore moderator-removed posts
floodAssistantIgnoreRemoved.helpText: If enabled, posts removed by moderators will not count towards the quota.

floodAssistantIgnoreDeleted.label: Flood Assistant — Ignore deleted posts
floodAssistantIgnoreDeleted.helpText: If enabled, posts deleted by the author will not count towards the quota.

selfResponseResponse.label: Self-Response Moderator — Self-response triggered comment
selfResponseResponse.helpText: Commented when a user responds to their own post.

selfResponseIgnoreModerators.label: Self-Response Moderator — Ignore moderators
selfResponseIgnoreModerators.helpText: If enabled, the self-response rule will not apply to moderators.

selfResponseIgnoreContributors.label: Self-Response Moderator — Ignore approved submitters
selfResponseIgnoreContributors.helpText: If enabled, the self-response rule will not apply to approved submitters.

depthCapModEnabled.label: Depth Cap — Enable
depthCapModEnabled.helpText: Enable or disable the depth cap module.

depthCapIgnoreModerators.label: Depth Cap — Ignore moderators
depthCapIgnoreModerators.helpText: Moderators are exempt from the depth cap.

depthCapIgnoreContributors.label: Depth Cap — Ignore approved submitters
depthCapIgnoreContributors.helpText: Approved submitters are exempt from the depth cap.

floodModEnabled.label: Flood Moderator — Enable
floodModEnabled.helpText: Enable or disable the flood moderator.

selfResponseModEnabled.label: Self-Response Moderator — Enable
selfResponseModEnabled.helpText: Enable or disable the self-response moderator.

lengthModEnabled.label: Length Moderator — Enable
lengthModEnabled.helpText: Enable or disable the length moderator.

lengthModFlairId.label: Length Moderator — Restricted flair template ID
lengthModFlairId.helpText: Posts with this flair are subject to the maximum length limit. Leave blank to disable.

lengthModMaxUnhostedLength.label: Length Moderator — Max unhosted length (characters)
lengthModMaxUnhostedLength.helpText: Maximum character count for posts with the restricted flair. 0 = disabled.

lengthModMinHostedLength.label: Length Moderator — Min hosted length (characters)
lengthModMinHostedLength.helpText: Minimum character count for link posts. 0 = disabled.

lengthModMaxUnhostedComment.label: Length Moderator — Over-length removal message
lengthModMaxUnhostedComment.helpText: Posted when a post exceeds the maximum length for its flair.

lengthModMinHostedComment.label: Length Moderator — Under-length removal message
lengthModMinHostedComment.helpText: Posted when a link post is below the minimum length.

mopToolEnabled.label: Chain Mop — Enable
mopToolEnabled.helpText: Enable or disable the Chain Mop action.

responseToolEnabled.label: Saved Responses — Enable
responseToolEnabled.helpText: Enable or disable the Saved Responses action.

defineCommandCategory.label: Define Command — Subject category
defineCommandCategory.helpText: Category used for term disambiguation in the !define command.

defineCommandSearchGrounding.label: Define Command — Search grounding
defineCommandSearchGrounding.helpText: Enable Google Search grounding for the !define command.

adversarialReviewerEnabled.label: Adversarial Reviewer — Enable
adversarialReviewerEnabled.helpText: Enable or disable the Adversarial Reviewer action.

adversarialReviewerFlairId.label: Adversarial Reviewer — Required flair template ID
adversarialReviewerFlairId.helpText: If set, only posts with this flair can request a review. Leave blank to allow any post.
